home.name: JayTang
home.title: Computer Science & Technology
home.aboutP1: Computer Science and Technology Honors Program student at Chongqing University (Class of 2024), specializing in embedded systems development and software engineering.
home.aboutP2: As a member of the START Spatiotemporal Laboratory at Chongqing University, I have participated in multiple embedded projects and gained extensive practical experience. Proficient in STM32 development, PCB design, and embedded system debugging.
